query:
UPDATE media.tv_shows
           SET name          = COALESCE($2, name),
               overview      = $3,
               poster_path   = $4,
               genres        = $5,
               networks      = $6,
               backdrop_path = COALESCE($7, backdrop_path),
               vote_average  = COALESCE(CAST($8::float8 AS numeric(3,1)), vote_average),
               vote_count    = COALESCE($9, vote_count),
               meta_status   = 'ready',
               meta_retries  = 0,
               updated_at    = NOW()
           WHERE id = $1
